name: Lamborghini Urus
generation: Urus SE (2024 facelift) / Urus S / Urus Performante

overview.minides: The world's fastest Super SUV — now with a PHEV variant (SE) doing 0–100 in 3.4 sec and 60 km of electric range.
overview.description: The Lamborghini Urus is available in India in three variants: Urus S (₹4.18 Cr), Urus Performante (₹4.22 Cr), and Urus SE PHEV (₹4.57 Cr). The Urus S is the refined Grand Tourismo-oriented variant with a 657 bhp twin-turbo V8. The Performante is the track-focused avatar with carbon fibre aero, Akrapovic exhaust, 22-inch wheels, and a Rally driving mode. The SE (2024 facelift) brings a plug-in hybrid 4.4L V8 + 25.9 kWh battery producing 800 PS / 950 Nm combined, with 60 km EV range, rear-axle steering, carbon-ceramic brakes, a redesigned interior with a 12.3-inch infotainment touchscreen, and updated exterior styling shared with the Huracan Sterrato-inspired aero language.

suspension.front: Double wishbone with adaptive air springs (ECAS) + active anti-roll bars
suspension.rear: Trapezoidal multi-link with adaptive air springs (ECAS) + active anti-roll bars
suspension.additionalTech: Active Roll Stabilisation (PDCC); 4-level height adjustment; rear-axle steering (SE only, up to 3°)

brakes.front: Carbon-ceramic (CCBM) standard on SE / Performante; optional on S — 440 mm front

sharedSpecs.platform: MLB Evo (Volkswagen Group Modular Longitudinal Platform)

v8-4-0L-tt-666ps-performante.name: 4.0L Twin-Turbo V8 — Urus Performante (666 PS)
v8-4-0L-tt-666ps-performante.tuningNotes: Higher boost, revised ECU, Akrapovic titanium exhaust, carbon intake

v8-4-4L-tt-phev-800ps-se.name: 4.4L Twin-Turbo V8 + Electric Motor — Urus SE PHEV (800 PS combined)
